title: NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina Part 3: First cDNA Strand Synthesis
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol is part 3 of a 10 part series. Please look at deck map and liquid legend below. This protocol adds the required reagents for the cDNA first strand synthesis
steps_raw: This protocol is part 3 of a 10 part series. Please look at deck map and liquid legend below. This protocol adds the required reagents for the cDNA first strand synthesis
Temperature module cools down to 4 C (this can be done manually prior to protocol start)
8 uL of strand specificity reagent is added from the temperature module in slot 3, column 1 to all samples
2 uL of enzyme mix is added from the temperature module in slot 3, column 3 to all samples then mixed to combine
Protocol is complete, OT-2 will flash to alert user
keywords: NEBNext® Ultra™ II Directional RNA Library Prep
materials_raw: Opentrons 96 Well Aluminum Block with Generic PCR Strip 200 µL
